Operating History Table Template

Source: Page 44 of PREVIEW-Master.html

Use Case: Financial operating history tables with multi-column headers and category sections

Template Structure

OPERATING HISTORY
CATEGORY YTD 2025 PROJECTION - DCAP
TOTAL $/UNIT %/PGR TOTAL $/UNIT %/PGR
RENTAL REVENUE
Total Multifamily Revenue $195,060 $12,191 96% $194,400 $12,150 95%
TOTAL RENTAL REVENUE $195,060 $12,191 96% $194,400 $12,150 95%
MISCELLANEOUS REVENUE
Parking Income $6,000 $375 3% $6,000 $375 3%
Laundry $2,400 $150 1% $2,400 $150 1%
TOTAL MISCELLANEOUS REVENUE $8,400 $525 4% $8,400 $525 4%
POTENTIAL GROSS REVENUE $203,460 $12,716 100% $202,800 $12,675 100%
OPERATING EXPENSES
Taxes ($18,600) ($1,163) (10%) ($19,688) ($1,231) (10%)
Insurance ($11,314) ($707) (6%) ($11,360) ($710) (6%)
NET OPERATING INCOME $109,301 $6,831 54% $109,445 $6,840 54%

CSS Classes Used

  • .compact-table - Main table class (8pt font, 3px 6px padding)
  • .table-section-header - Blue header bar above table
  • .text-right - Right-aligned numbers
  • .negative - Red text for negative values/expenses

Row Styling Patterns

  • Section headers: background-color: #e8eef7; font-weight: bold; with empty cells
  • Data rows: padding-left: 16px; on first cell for indentation
  • Subtotals: Same as section headers but with data
  • Final total: background-color: #d4e6f1; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10pt;

Header Structure

  • Row 1: Category column with rowspan="2", then colspan="3" for each data section
  • Row 2: Individual column headers (TOTAL, $/UNIT, %/PGR) repeated for each section
